info.title: AgentPay API
info.description: Payment API for AI agents. Let your bot spend money.

get.description: Check API health status. Returns service name and version.
Serve landing page.

schema.title: Response List Transactions V1 Transactions Get

post.description: Rotate the API key for this agent. Returns the new key ONCE. Old key stops working immediately.
Spend funds from the agent's balance. Supports idempotency keys and approval workflows.
Refund a completed spend transaction. Credits amount + fee back to agent.
Transfer funds from this agent to another agent (same owner only). No fees.

get.description: List all supported blockchain networks.
Get wallet info for a specific chain.
Get wallet info across all supported chains.

post.description: Send USDC on the specified chain.
Send native token (ETH/POL/BNB/SOL) on the specified chain.

get.description: Get virtual card details (last4, expiry, state, spend limit).

schema.title: Response Card Transactions V1 Card Transactions Get

post.description: Agent pays for an x402-gated resource using their on-chain wallet.

get.description: Probe a URL to check if it's x402-gated and see pricing. No auth needed.
Get the authenticated agent's identity profile.

put.description: Create or update the authenticated agent's identity profile.

get.description: Get detailed trust score breakdown for the authenticated agent.
Public agent directory — browse registered agents with optional category filter.
Get a public agent profile by agent ID.
Platform revenue summary. Admin only.

post.description: Withdraw accumulated platform fees as USDC to owner wallet. Admin only.

Validate Telegram Mini App initData and return a JWT token.
In dev mode (no BOT_TOKEN), accepts any initData for testing.

get.description: List all agents belonging to the authenticated Telegram user.
Get transactions for a specific agent (must belong to the user).
Get virtual card details for an agent.

post.description: Pause or resume a virtual card.

get.description: Get on-chain wallet info for an agent on a specific chain.
Get wallet balances across all chains for an agent.
Main dashboard data — overview of all agents, balances, and activity.
Agent analytics — daily volume, spending breakdown, hourly heatmap, balance history.
Get an agent's identity card (for dashboard display).

MCP SSE stream endpoint (GET).

Per the Streamable HTTP spec, GET opens an SSE stream for server-initiated
messages. For AgentPay, we return server info since we don't push events.
Validates Mcp-Session-Id if provided.

post.description:
Streamable HTTP MCP endpoint.

Accepts JSON-RPC messages (single or batch) and returns responses.
If Accept includes text/event-stream, responds with SSE.
Otherwise returns plain JSON-RPC.

Session management:
- On `initialize`: creates a new session, returns Mcp-Session-Id header
- On subsequent requests: validates Mcp-Session-Id, returns 404 if invalid

delete.description:
Terminate an MCP session.

Per the Streamable HTTP spec, clients send DELETE to end a session.
Returns 200 if session was terminated, 404 if session not found.
